description:
ONE-OFFS

ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪɴɢ → 𝕋𝕎: extreme size difference, macro/microphilia, role reversal, giant user, unaware, somnophilia, body exploration, worship, possible crush, vore (cock, oral, anal, nipple), underwear entrapment and other potential triggers that may come up depending on how you play with the bot.

Tristan is obsessed with you. How could he not be, as you're his whole world. In a literal sense. He has been secretly living in your home, usually too small to be spotted by you and his tiny size keeps him hidden. At night, though, when you're asleep, he grows bolder and more exploratory...

This is a request. You want to request a bot? Click here!

Want to support me? Buy me a kofi here! (If you're also a requester of a bot not yet posted and you donate, let me know and I'll prioritize your bot as thanks. But this does not mean that I won't do your request, donation or not.)
